G

gender - Variable in class model.Person
Person's gender (string: "f" or "m")
gender - Variable in class model.User
User's gender (string: "f" or "m")
gender - Variable in class request.RegisterRequest
User's gender (string: "f" or "m")
gender - Variable in class result.PersonIDResult
Person's gender
generateAncestralData() - Method in class service.RegisterService
Generates 4 generations of ancestor data for a new user
generateResponseBody() - Method in class request.RegisterRequest
Generate a response body with the authToken, userName, and personID
getAllEvents(User) - Method in class service.Service
Returns all the events in the database that are associated with a given user
getAllPersons(User) - Method in class service.Service
Returns all the persons in the database that are associated with a given user
getAllUsers() - Method in class service.Service
Returns all the users in the database
